codeReview.summary: The audit of yj_to_epub_misc.py (611 lines, 15 functions) against Go counterparts (yj_to_epub_misc.go 271 lines + svg.go 279 lines) is thorough and accurate. Two real bugs were found and fixed in commit 6ae9856: $98 transform using raw fmt.Sprintf instead of processTransform, and $650 polygon missing from propertyValueList. The function-by-function mapping table is complete and correctly maps all 15 Python functions. The 7 fully-parity functions (condition operators, evaluate, evaluateBinary, processPolygon, processTransform) were verified line-by-line against Python and match. The 6 missing/partial functions are correctly identified as FXL/plugin-only features not needed for current test books. All verification commands passed: build, tests, and 394/394 comparison parity.

issues.description: $750 (layout_type) operator: Go silently returns false for unknown layout types, while Python logs an error ("yj.layout_type unknown: %s"). Minor logging gap — functionally equivalent since both return false, but the missing error log could make debugging harder if an unknown layout type is encountered.

processKVGShape $270 branch creates an empty <text> element instead of iterating content_list to find matching content by $155/$598 and calling process_content (Python L249-271). This only affects KVG/illustrated layout books — none of the 6 test books use this feature. The worker correctly identified and documented this gap.

processPath IonStruct path bundle lookup is stubbed (logs error, returns empty string) instead of looking up book_data["$692"] and recursively processing (Python L291-301). Only affects KVG shapes with path bundles — not present in test books. Correctly documented.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The audit findings document (audit-yj-to-epub-misc-findings.md) is well-structured and provides a complete function-by-function mapping. This pattern of documenting audit findings in .factory/library/ is valuable for future audits and should be considered as a template for other parity audit features.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/audit-yj-to-epub-misc-findings.md — 61-line document with function mapping table, fixes applied, known gaps, and test results

sharedStateObservations.observation: Python's check_empty() validation function (yj_to_epub.py:344, utilities.py:175) is consistently not ported across all Go files. This is a debugging/validation-only function that logs warnings for unexpected remaining dict keys. The decision to skip it is reasonable but should be documented as a systematic choice rather than a per-file omission.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Python yj_to_epub_misc.py:285 calls self.check_empty(shape, "shape"). Go svg.go processKVGShape has no equivalent. Similar pattern in other audited files.

summary: The audit is thorough and correctly executed. All 15 Python functions are accounted for in the mapping table. Two real bugs were found and fixed ($98 transform and $650 polygon in propertyValueList). The 7 core functions achieve full parity. The 6 missing/partial functions are correctly scoped as FXL/plugin-only features not needed for current test books. The processKVGShape $270 and processPath IonStruct gaps are the most significant omissions but are correctly documented and don't affect current output. Verification confirms 394/394 parity with all tests passing. One minor logging gap ($750 unknown layout types silently returns false instead of logging error) but this is functionally equivalent.
